mapper.sql: vr.id, vr.student_id, vr.passport_no, vr.visa_type, vr.visa_no, vr.issue_place, vr.issue_date, vr.valid_from, vr.valid_until, vr.entry_count, vr.status, vr.remark, vr.deleted, vr.create_time, vr.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visa_record (student_id, passport_no, visa_type, visa_no, issue_place, issue_date, valid_from, valid_until, entry_count, status, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{passportNo}, #{visaType}, #{visaNo}, #{issuePlace}, #{issueDate}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, #{entryCount}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE visa_record SET student_id = #{studentId}, passport_no = #{passportNo}, visa_type = #{visaType}, visa_no = #{visaNo}, issue_place = #{issuePlace}, issue_date = #{issueDate}, valid_from = #{validFrom}, valid_until = #{validUntil}, entry_count = #{entryCount}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE visa_record SET valid_until = #{validUntil}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE visa_record SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visa_record vr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = vr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE vr.id = #{id} AND vr.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM visa_record vr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = vr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0

SELECT FROM visa_record vr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = vr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0
ORDER BY vr.valid_until ASC, vr.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT FROM visa_record vr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = vr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE vr.student_id = #{studentId} AND vr.deleted = 0 ORDER BY vr.valid_until DESC, vr.id DESC

SELECT FROM visa_record vr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = vr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE vr.deleted = 0 AND vr.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED') AND vr.valid_until IS NOT NULL AND vr.valid_until <= #{deadline}
